chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-158 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahessar, Advocate for petitioners. M/s Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG a/w SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur and SIP Habibullah, I.O of the Case. **** Syed Muhammad Ali Shah, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents, taken on record. Learned Law Officers file statements of respondents No.2&3, taken on record and copies whereof are supplied to counsel for the petitioners. In their statements, official respondents categorically submit to have neither caused any harassment to the petitioners nor they intend to do so and they will act strictly in accordance with law. Learned counsel representing private respondents also states that neither private respondents have caused any sort of harassment to the petitioners nor intend to do so in future. After such statements, counsel for petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. JUDGE Ahmad
